faqs.question: How to open account?
faqs.answer: You need Aadhaar, PAN and address proof. Visit nearest branch or use Capital Bank mobile app.

faqs.question: What documents are required for a savings account?
faqs.answer: You need: Aadhaar card, PAN card, 2 passport-size photos, and address proof (utility bill or rental agreement).

faqs.question: How long does it take to open an account?
faqs.answer: Online account opening takes 24-48 hours. In-branch opening is completed the same day if all documents are in order.

faqs.question: What is the minimum balance for a savings account?
faqs.answer: The minimum average monthly balance is ₹5,000 for urban branches and ₹2,000 for rural/semi-urban branches.

faqs.question: Can I open a joint account?
faqs.answer: Yes, Capital Bank offers joint accounts with up to 4 holders. All holders must submit KYC documents. You can choose 'Either or Survivor' or 'Jointly' operation mode.

faqs.question: Can I open a zero-balance account?
faqs.answer: Yes. Capital Bank offers a Basic Savings Bank Deposit (BSBD) account with zero minimum balance, available to all Indian residents.

faqs.question: How do I open a minor's account?
faqs.answer: A minor's account can be opened by a parent or guardian with the child's birth certificate, Aadhaar, and the guardian's KYC documents. Minor can operate independently from age 10.

faqs.question: What is the penalty for not maintaining minimum balance?
faqs.answer: A non-maintenance charge of ₹200–₹500 per month is levied depending on the shortfall and branch type. No penalty applies to zero-balance accounts.

faqs.question: Can NRIs open an account with Capital Bank?
faqs.answer: Yes. NRIs can open NRE (Non-Resident External) or NRO (Non-Resident Ordinary) accounts. Visit capitalbank.com/nri or contact your nearest branch for documentation.

faqs.question: How do I update my KYC details?
faqs.answer: Update KYC via Capital Bank app → Profile → Update KYC, or visit a branch with fresh Aadhaar and address proof. Re-KYC is required every 2 years for high-risk accounts.

sections.name: UPI & Payments
sections.description: UPI limits, transfers, and payment services

faqs.question: What is the UPI daily transaction limit?
faqs.answer: The daily UPI limit is ₹1,00,000 across all UPI apps linked to your Capital Bank account.

faqs.question: How do I set up UPI on Capital Bank app?
faqs.answer: Open Capital Bank app → UPI → Register → Link your account → Set UPI PIN using debit card details.

faqs.question: What is the NEFT/RTGS transfer limit?
faqs.answer: NEFT: No upper limit (minimum ₹1). RTGS: Minimum ₹2,00,000, no upper cap. Both are available 24x7.

faqs.question: How do I transfer money via IMPS?
faqs.answer: IMPS transfers are available 24x7 up to ₹5,00,000 per transaction via net banking or mobile app.

faqs.question: My UPI payment failed but money was debited. What do I do?
faqs.answer: Failed UPI transactions are auto-reversed within 24-48 hours. If not, raise a dispute via Capital Bank app → UPI → Transaction History → Raise Dispute, or call 1800-123-4567.

faqs.question: How do I change my UPI PIN?
faqs.answer: Open Capital Bank app → UPI → Settings → Change UPI PIN. You will need your debit card number and expiry date to reset.

faqs.question: Can I send money internationally?
faqs.answer: Yes. Capital Bank supports outward remittance under FEMA guidelines. Visit any branch or use net banking under 'Forex Services'. Maximum limit: USD 2,50,000 per financial year under LRS.

faqs.question: What are the charges for NEFT and RTGS?
faqs.answer: NEFT: Free via mobile/net banking. RTGS: Free for transactions above ₹2,00,000 via digital channels. Branch-initiated transfers may attract a nominal charge.

faqs.question: How do I add a beneficiary for fund transfer?
faqs.answer: Login to net banking or app → Fund Transfer → Add Beneficiary → Enter IFSC code and account number → Confirm via OTP. New beneficiaries have a 4-hour cooling period for large transfers.

faqs.question: What is the difference between NEFT, RTGS, and IMPS?
faqs.answer: NEFT: Batch processing, any amount, takes 30 min–2 hours. RTGS: Real-time, minimum ₹2 lakh, instant. IMPS: Instant, up to ₹5 lakh, 24x7 including holidays. All are available on Capital Bank app.

faqs.question: How do I link multiple bank accounts to UPI?
faqs.answer: Open your preferred UPI app → Add/Manage Bank Accounts → Select Capital Bank → Your registered mobile number will fetch all linked accounts. You can set one as the default.

sections.name: Cards
sections.description: Debit and Credit card services and management

faqs.question: How do I block my debit card?
faqs.answer: Use Capital Bank app → Cards → Block Card instantly. You can also call 1800-123-4567 or SMS BLOCK<last 4 digits> to 567676.

faqs.question: How do I apply for a credit card?
faqs.answer: Apply online at capitalbank.com/cards or visit any branch. You need income proof, PAN, Aadhaar, and 3 months' bank statement.

faqs.question: What is the credit card billing cycle?
faqs.answer: The billing cycle is 30 days. Your statement is generated on the 1st of each month with a 20-day interest-free period.

faqs.question: How do I increase my credit card limit?
faqs.answer: Log in to net banking → Cards → Request Limit Enhancement. Approval depends on credit history and income.

faqs.question: How do I get a new debit card or replace a lost one?
faqs.answer: Request a replacement via Capital Bank app → Cards → Request New Card, or call 1800-123-4567. Card is delivered within 5-7 working days. A nominal re-issuance fee may apply.

faqs.question: How do I set or change my debit card PIN?
faqs.answer: Set or change your debit card PIN via Capital Bank app → Cards → Change PIN, at any Capital Bank ATM using your registered mobile OTP, or call 1800-123-4567.

faqs.question: What are the daily ATM withdrawal limits?
faqs.answer: Standard debit card: ₹25,000/day at ATMs. Premium variants may allow up to ₹50,000/day. POS and online limits are separate and can be customised via the app.

faqs.question: What is the minimum payment due on a credit card?
faqs.answer: The minimum amount due is 5% of the outstanding balance or ₹500, whichever is higher. Paying only the minimum due attracts interest at 3.5% per month on the remaining balance.

faqs.question: How do I pay my credit card bill?
faqs.answer: Pay via Capital Bank app → Cards → Pay Bill, net banking, UPI using your credit card VPA, NEFT/IMPS, or at any Capital Bank branch. Pay before the due date to avoid interest.

faqs.question: Can I convert my credit card purchase into EMI?
faqs.answer: Yes. Purchases above ₹2,500 can be converted to EMI. Go to Capital Bank app → Cards → Convert to EMI and choose 3, 6, 9, or 12 month tenure. Interest rates start from 12% p.a.

faqs.question: How do I enable or disable international transactions on my card?
faqs.answer: Toggle international usage via Capital Bank app → Cards → Card Controls → International Transactions. Disable when not travelling to protect against fraud.

faqs.question: What are the charges for using another bank's ATM?
faqs.answer: Capital Bank offers 5 free transactions per month at other bank ATMs in metro cities and 3 in non-metro cities. Beyond that, ₹20 per financial transaction is charged.

faqs.question: How do I apply for a personal loan?
faqs.answer: Apply via Capital Bank app or website. You need salary slips (3 months), PAN, Aadhaar, and bank statements (6 months). Disbursal in 2-3 working days.

faqs.question: What is the home loan interest rate?
faqs.answer: Home loan interest rates start from 8.5% p.a. (floating). Rates vary based on loan amount, tenure, and credit score.

faqs.question: What is the EMI for a personal loan?
faqs.answer: EMI depends on loan amount, interest rate, and tenure. Use our EMI calculator at capitalbank.com/emi-calculator.

faqs.question: How to foreclose or prepay a loan?
faqs.answer: Visit the nearest branch or call 1800-123-4567. Foreclosure charges: 2% of outstanding principal after 6 EMIs.

faqs.question: What is the maximum personal loan amount I can get?
faqs.answer: Personal loans are available from ₹50,000 to ₹25,00,000 depending on your income, credit score, and employer profile. Salaried employees with a CIBIL score above 750 get the best rates.

faqs.question: What is the interest rate on a personal loan?
faqs.answer: Personal loan interest rates range from 10.5% to 18% p.a. based on your CIBIL score, income, and loan tenure. Pre-approved customers may get lower rates.

faqs.question: How do I check my loan status?
faqs.answer: Check your loan application status via Capital Bank app → Loans → Track Application, or call 1800-123-4567 with your application reference number.

faqs.question: Can I get a loan against my fixed deposit?
faqs.answer: Yes. Capital Bank offers loans/overdrafts against FD up to 90% of the deposit value. Interest rate is 1-2% above the FD rate. Apply via net banking or visit a branch.

faqs.question: What is a gold loan and how do I apply?
faqs.answer: Capital Bank offers gold loans starting from ₹10,000 at interest rates from 7.5% p.a. Bring your gold jewellery to any branch for valuation and instant disbursal.

faqs.question: How do I get an education loan?
faqs.answer: Education loans are available from ₹50,000 to ₹1.5 crore for studies in India and abroad. Apply at capitalbank.com/education-loan. Moratorium period covers the course duration plus 1 year.

faqs.question: What is a top-up loan?
faqs.answer: A top-up loan is an additional loan on your existing home or personal loan. Eligible after 12 months of regular repayment. Apply via net banking → Loans → Request Top-Up.

faqs.question: How do I download my loan repayment statement or NOC?
faqs.answer: Download your loan statement or NOC via Capital Bank app → Loans → Statements. After loan closure, your NOC is dispatched within 7 working days and also available digitally on the app.

faqs.question: What is the customer care number?
faqs.answer: Call 1800-123-4567 (24x7 toll-free) or 1800-425-0012. Email: support@capitalbank.com

faqs.question: How do I raise a complaint?
faqs.answer: Raise a complaint via: App → Help → Raise Ticket, or email grievance@capitalbank.com, or visit your nearest branch.

faqs.question: Where can I find the nearest branch or ATM?
faqs.answer: Use Capital Bank app → Branch/ATM Locator, or visit capitalbank.com/locator to find branches and ATMs near you.

faqs.question: What are Capital Bank's branch working hours?
faqs.answer: Most Capital Bank branches are open Monday to Friday: 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM, and Saturday: 9:30 AM – 1:00 PM (except 2nd and 4th Saturdays). Branches are closed on Sundays and public holidays.

faqs.question: How do I escalate an unresolved complaint?
faqs.answer: If your complaint is unresolved after 30 days, escalate to our Nodal Officer at nodal@capitalbank.com or contact the RBI Banking Ombudsman at bankingombudsman.rbi.org.in.

faqs.question: How do I report a fraud or unauthorized transaction?
faqs.answer: Report immediately by calling 1800-123-4567 (24x7) or via app → Help → Report Fraud. Block your card instantly. Prompt reporting (within 3 days) ensures zero liability for unauthorized transactions in most cases.

faqs.question: How do I give feedback about my banking experience?
faqs.answer: Share feedback via Capital Bank app → Help → Feedback, email feedback@capitalbank.com, or fill out the feedback form at capitalbank.com/feedback.

faqs.question: Can I do video KYC instead of visiting a branch?
faqs.answer: Yes. Capital Bank offers Video KYC for account opening. Schedule a Video KYC session via the app or website. You will need a clear Aadhaar printout and PAN card during the call.

faqs.question: What is the current FD interest rate?
faqs.answer: Capital Bank FD rates: 1 year – 6.75%, 2 years – 7.00%, 3-5 years – 7.25%. Senior citizens get 0.50% extra.

faqs.question: How to open a Fixed Deposit?
faqs.answer: Open FD via: Net banking → Deposits → Open FD, or Capital Bank app → Deposits → New FD. Minimum amount: ₹10,000.

faqs.question: What is a Recurring Deposit (RD)?
faqs.answer: RD allows monthly deposits starting from ₹500. Current RD interest rate: 6.50% p.a. for 12-24 month tenure.

faqs.question: Can I break my FD before maturity?
faqs.answer: Yes. Premature FD closure is allowed. A penalty of 0.5–1% below the applicable rate is charged. Partial withdrawal is available for FDs above ₹1,00,000. Apply via app or branch.

faqs.question: Is TDS deducted on FD interest?
faqs.answer: Yes. TDS is deducted at 10% if FD interest exceeds ₹40,000 per year (₹50,000 for senior citizens). Submit Form 15G (below 60 years) or 15H (60+ years) to avoid TDS if your income is below the taxable limit.

faqs.question: How do I renew my FD on maturity?
faqs.answer: Enable auto-renewal when creating the FD. To renew manually, go to Capital Bank app → Deposits → Select FD → Renew. You can also change the tenure and payout option at renewal.

faqs.question: What is a tax-saving FD?
faqs.answer: A 5-year tax-saving FD qualifies for deduction up to ₹1,50,000 under Section 80C. Lock-in period is 5 years with no premature withdrawal. Interest is taxable.

faqs.question: Does Capital Bank offer mutual funds or SIP?
faqs.answer: Yes. Capital Bank offers mutual fund investments and SIP via the app under Investments → Mutual Funds. You can start a SIP from ₹500/month across various fund categories.

faqs.question: What is a sweep-in FD?
faqs.answer: Sweep-in FD automatically transfers excess savings account balance above a set threshold into an FD, earning higher interest. The amount sweeps back when your savings balance falls below the threshold.

faqs.question: How do I get my FD interest certificate for tax filing?
faqs.answer: Download your FD interest certificate or Form 16A via Capital Bank app → Deposits → Interest Certificate, or from net banking → Accounts → Tax Documents.

sections.name: Digital Banking
sections.description: Mobile app, net banking, and security

faqs.question: How do I check my account balance?
faqs.answer: SMS: BAL<last 4 digits> to 567676. Or use Capital Bank mobile app, net banking, or missed call on 8800-123456.

faqs.question: How do I reset my net banking password?
faqs.answer: Go to capitalbank.com → Login → Forgot Password → Enter registered mobile/email → Verify OTP → Set new password.

faqs.question: Is Capital Bank app safe?
faqs.answer: Yes. The app uses 256-bit encryption, 2-factor authentication, and real-time fraud monitoring. Never share OTP or PIN with anyone.

faqs.question: How do I download the Capital Bank app?
faqs.answer: Search 'Capital Bank' on Google Play Store (Android) or Apple App Store (iOS). Download the official app verified by Capital Bank Ltd.

faqs.question: How do I download my account statement?
faqs.answer: Download your statement via Capital Bank app → Accounts → Statements → Choose date range → Download PDF. Statements up to 10 years are available. You can also receive monthly e-statements via email.

faqs.question: How do I register for net banking?
faqs.answer: Visit capitalbank.com → Login → New User → Enter account number and registered mobile → Verify OTP → Set password. Alternatively, register at any branch or ATM.

faqs.question: Can I access Capital Bank net banking from abroad?
faqs.answer: Yes. Capital Bank net banking is accessible worldwide at capitalbank.com. However, UPI is only available within India. Enable international card access separately before travelling.

faqs.question: How do I update my mobile number or email in bank records?
faqs.answer: Update your mobile number by visiting any branch with Aadhaar proof (mobile update requires in-branch verification). Email can be updated via net banking → Profile → Update Email → Verify OTP.

faqs.question: What is a passbook and how do I get one?
faqs.answer: A passbook records all account transactions. Collect one from your home branch. Use the passbook kiosk at branches for self-printing. Digital passbook is also available on the Capital Bank app.

faqs.question: How do I enable or disable SMS/email alerts?
faqs.answer: Manage alerts via Capital Bank app → Settings → Notifications, or net banking → Services → Manage Alerts. Set transaction thresholds for SMS/email notifications.

faqs.question: What should I do if my phone is lost and the banking app is installed?
faqs.answer: Immediately call 1800-123-4567 to deactivate mobile banking on the lost device. Change your net banking password and UPI PIN from another device. Block your card if needed.

sections.name: Account Management
sections.description: Managing and operating your existing account

faqs.question: How do I close my bank account?
faqs.answer: Visit your home branch with a written closure request, your passbook, debit card, and an unused cheque leaf. Account closure is free within 14 days and ₹500 if closed within 1 year.

faqs.question: How do I transfer my account to another branch?
faqs.answer: Submit a transfer request at your current branch or via net banking → Services → Account Transfer. Account number and all linked services (debit card, net banking) remain unchanged.

faqs.question: What is the process to add a nominee to my account?
faqs.answer: Add or update a nominee via Capital Bank app → Profile → Nominee Management, or net banking → Services → Nomination. You can also fill Form DA-1 at any branch. Keeping nominee details updated is strongly recommended.

off_topic_response: I'm Capital Bank's AI assistant and can only help with banking-related queries such as accounts, loans, cards, UPI, FDs, and digital banking. For other topics, I'd recommend consulting the appropriate resources. Is there anything banking-related I can help you with? 😊
fallback_response: I don't have specific information on that. Please contact our customer care at **1800-123-4567** (24x7) or email **support@capitalbank.com**, or visit your nearest Capital Bank branch.
